name: wbhi-qc
label: WBHI QC Gear
description: Flywheel gear that aids in the quality control of the WBHI pipeline.
author: Joe Wexler

unique_csv.description: A 'unique' csv from a prior run that has been manually filled out.

all_csv.description: An 'all' csv from a the same run as 'unique_csv'.

mode.description: generate: scan project and produce QC CSVs and PDF. apply: process filled-out CSV inputs and apply actions. diff: compare filled-out CSV inputs against current project state.

mosaic.description: Create a BIDS mosaic PDF. Only applies in generate mode.
